overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The journey transitions from a neon-lit commercial sidewalk beneath elevated highways, through a dark industrial alley with massive overhead pipes, to a busy urban intersection with street crossings and moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk beneath elevated highways

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing passes quickly from right to left in front of camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange sidewalk, passing metal railings and approaching digital billboards

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk, passing by closely

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with pink lettering mounted on building facade
massive illuminated display showing animated advertisements above the street
distinctive orange-brown paved pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
green metal barrier separating sidewalk from street level
large industrial ventilation unit with horizontal slats on building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit commercial sidewalk at dusk, passing beneath elevated highway structures. The orange paved walkway is lined with metal railings on the left and concrete buildings on the right, with massive digital billboards and a prominent 'WET DREAM' neon sign visible ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions and vehicles move along the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley with massive overhead pipes

events.description: exits bright commercial sidewalk and enters dark industrial alley with overhead pipe infrastructure

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow industrial alleyway beneath massive pipes and industrial infrastructure

entered.detail: massive cylindrical conduits running overhead between industrial buildings
tall concrete wall with graffiti and weathered surfaces
green and red industrial waste containers against the wall
tall vertical exhaust stacks with red lights at base

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, shadowed industrial alleyway sheltered by massive overhead pipes. The ground changes from paved tiles to dirt and debris, with concrete walls on the right featuring graffiti. The area is devoid of pedestrians and vehicles, creating a stark contrast to the previous commercial street, with industrial exhaust towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection beneath elevated highway

events.description: character crosses the street at crosswalk while vehicles wait at intersection
turns slightly right to navigate around pedestrians on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, crossing the street at a crosswalk, and continuing through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the intersection overhead
large round industrial building with external piping and platforms
vertical traffic signal showing green for pedestrians
multiple illuminated commercial signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide urban intersection beneath massive elevated highways. The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating through moderate crowds of pedestrians. A distinctive cylindrical industrial tower dominates the left side while vehicles drive through the intersection. The area mixes industrial architecture with commercial neon signage, transitioning from the enclosed alley back to the open city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that dips into a desolate industrial corridor before emerging into a bustling urban intersection. It begins on an orange paved sidewalk beneath elevated highways, passing digital billboards and a prominent Wet Dream neon sign amidst sparse pedestrians and traffic. As the character moves forward, the vibrant street gives way to a narrow, shadowed alleyway where the ground shifts to dirt and debris beneath massive overhead pipes and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then opens from this enclosed industrial silence back into the wide expanse of the city, crossing a marked street under towering highway structures. Finally, the environment blends industrial architecture with commercial neon as the camera navigates through moderate crowds and passing vehicles near a dominant cylindrical tower.
